ValidationRule.description:
For All Judgment Statuses (except for Denied) Following fields become mandatory Filing date,
Non Editable: Judgment Date, Judgment Amount, Judgment Province,
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISPICKVAL( Legal_Status__c ,'Judgment'), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Legal_Sub_Status__c ,'Denied')), OR( ISBLANK( Filing_Date__c ), ISBLANK( Judgment_Date__c ), ISBLANK( Judgment_Amount__c ), ISPICKVAL(Judgment_Province__c, ''), ISBLANK( Balance_one__c ), ISBLANK( Interest_Rate_one__c),
AND( NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Judgment_Date__c))), ISCHANGED(Judgment_Date__c) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Judgment_Amount__c))), ISCHANGED(Judgment_Amount__c) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(PRIORVALUE(Judgment_Province__c))), ISCHANGED(Judgment_Province__c) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage:
The following fields become mandatory Filing date, Balance-1, Interest Rate-1
Not Editable: Judgment Date, Judgment Amount, Judgment Province
